hero-description: Ethereum is not just a cryptocurrency. It is a platform for applications that put you in control of your money, identity, and data.
financial-tools-description: Open financial services that anyone can access with an internet connection. No banks to approve accounts, no middlemen to take a cut, and no borders limiting who can participate.
defi-description: Lend, borrow, trade, and earn interest without middlemen like banks or brokers. You control your money directly.
stablecoins-description: Digital dollars and other currencies that hold their value. Combine the stability of traditional money with the speed and openness of Ethereum.
payments-description: Send money anywhere in the world in minutes with low fees. No bank accounts or paperwork required.
rwa-description: Buy shares of real estate, bonds, and other traditional investments through Ethereum, with lower minimums and fewer barriers.
digital-ownership-description: Own digital items in a way that is verifiable, transferable, and independent of any company.
nft-description: Unique digital items with provable ownership. Creators sell directly to audiences and collectors hold verifiable originals.
gaming-description: Games where you truly own your in-game items and game rules are public and can't be changed behind your back.
organizations-description: Make decisions together, prove who you are, and use social platforms no company controls.
dao-description: Community-run organizations where members vote on decisions together. No single person controls the funds or rules.
identity-description: Own and control your digital identity without relying on big tech. Prove things about yourself without revealing more than necessary.
social-description: Social platforms where you own your data, content, and connections. No company can deplatform you or sell your information.
science-description: Fund research directly and coordinate environmental projects without gatekeepers.
desci-description: Open infrastructure for funding, publishing, and crediting scientific research. Making science more transparent and accessible to everyone.
refi-description: Financial tools designed to fund environmental and social regeneration rather than extraction.
emerging-description: New applications are constantly being built on Ethereum. These areas are growing fast.
ai-agents-description: AI assistants that can manage money and follow rules you set, automatically, using Ethereum for secure transactions.
prediction-markets-description: People put money behind their predictions on future events, producing real-time crowd-sourced forecasts.
restaking-description: Extend Ethereum's security to other networks and services by reusing staked ETH, earning additional rewards while strengthening the ecosystem.
ready-to-start-description: To use most Ethereum applications, you need a wallet and some ETH. A wallet is a free app that lets you interact with Ethereum.
